paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And it came to pass on the day that Moses had made an end of setting up the tabernacle, and had anointed it and sanctified it, and all the furniture thereof, and the altar and all the vessels thereof, and had anointed them and sanctified them;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: that the princes of Israel, the heads of their fathers` houses, offered. These were the princes of the tribes, these are they that were over them that were numbered:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and they brought their oblation before Jehovah, six covered wagons, and twelve oxen; a wagon for every two of the princes, and for each one an ox: and they presented them before the tabernacle.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Jehovah spake unto Moses, saying,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Take it of them, that they may be [used] in doing the service of the tent of meeting; and thou shalt give them unto the Levites, to every man according to his service.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Moses took the wagons and the oxen, and gave them unto the Levites.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Two wagons and four oxen he gave unto the sons of Gershon, according to their service:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and four wagons and eight oxen he gave unto the sons of Merari, according unto their service, under the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: But unto the sons of Kohath he gave none, because the service of the sanctuary belonged unto them; they bare it upon their shoulders.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the princes offered for the dedication of the altar in the day that it was anointed, even the princes offered their oblation before the altar.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Jehovah said unto Moses, They shall offer their oblation, each prince on his day, for the dedication of the altar.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he that offered his oblation the first day was Nahshon the son of Amminadab, of the tribe of Judah:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and his oblation was one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred and thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Nahshon the son of Amminadab.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the second day Nethanel the son of Zuar, prince of Issachar, did offer:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: he offered for his oblation one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred and thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Nethanel the son of Zuar.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the third day Eliab the son of Helon, prince of the children of Zebulun.:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: his oblation was one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred and thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Eliab the son of Helon.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the fourth day Elizur the son of Shedeur, prince of the children of Reuben:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: his oblation was one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred and thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Elizur the son of Shedeur.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the fifth day Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai, prince of the children of Simeon:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: his oblation was one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred and thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the sixth day Eliasaph the son of Deuel, prince of the children of Gad:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: his oblation was one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred and thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Eliasaph the son of Deuel.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the seventh day Elishama the son of Ammihud, prince of the children of Ephraim:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: his oblation was one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred and thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Elishama the son of Ammihud.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the eighth day Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur, prince of the children of Manasseh:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: his oblation was one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred and thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the ninth day Abidan the son of Gideoni, prince of the children of Benjamin:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: his oblation was one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred and thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Abidan the son of Gideoni.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the tenth day Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai, prince of the children of Dan:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: his oblation was one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred and thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the eleventh day Pagiel the son of Ochran, prince of the children of Asher:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: his oblation was one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred and thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Pagiel the son of Ochran.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the twelfth day Ahira the son of Enan, prince of the children of Naphtali:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: his oblation was one silver platter, the weight whereof was a hundred a thirty [shekels], one silver bowl of seventy shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mingled with oil for a meal-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of incense;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one young bullock, one ram, one he-lamb a year old, for a burnt-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: one male of the goats for a sin-offering;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and for the sacrifice of peace-offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five he-lambs a year old: this was the oblation of Ahira the son of Enan.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: This was the dedication of the altar, in the day when it was anointed, by the princes of Israel: twelve silver platters, twelve silver bowls, twelve golden spoons;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: each silver platter [weighing] a hundred and thirty [shekels], and each bowl seventy; all the silver of the vessels two thousand and four hundred [shekels], after the shekel of the sanctuary;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: the twelve golden spoons, full of incense, [weighing] ten [shekels] apiece, after the shekel of the sanctuary; all the gold of the spoons a hundred and twenty [shekels];

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: all the oxen for the burnt-offering twelve bullocks, the rams twelve, the he-lambs a year old twelve, and their meal-offering; and the males of the goats for a sin-offering twelve;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and all the oxen for the sacrifice of peace-offerings twenty and four bullocks, the rams sixty, the he-goats sixty, the he-lambs a year old sixty. This was the dedication of the altar, after that it was anointed.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And when Moses went into the tent of meeting to speak with him, then he heard the Voice speaking unto him from above the mercy-seat that was upon the ark of the testimony, from between the two cherubim: and he spake unto him.
